sglang.title: [Gemma4]: Fix FP8 Triton scale layout
sglang.author: Ratish1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #25227.
google/gemma-4-31B-it failed to load with --quantization fp8 --tp 2 when the Triton W8A8 FP8 path received an online-quantized weight scale as a row vector. The GEMM was semantically valid, but triton_scaled_mm only accepted the same per-output-channel scale as a column vect

sglang.title: verify_done: wait not synchronize
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Use event.wait() (stream-level) instead of .synchronize() (CPU block) in maybe_wait_verify_done. Schedule-stream prep ops following the wait are ordered after the forward-stream verify via the stream wait; CPU is no longer blocked. Subsequent .cpu() / .item() calls naturally sync the stream.

sglang.title: [NSA] Avoid repeated NSA MQA logits memory queries
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

NSA indexer may call torch.cuda.mem_get_info on the large MQA logits path. This is a host-syncing query on a latency-sensitive prefill path. Reported-by: @samuellees
Modifications

Cache a per-device MQA logits budget instead of querying free memory on every large prefill.
Reuse cu_seqlen

producing incorrect results.

In docs/features/mooncake_store_connector_usage.md, the Disaggregated Prefill-Decode (XpYd) example sets the inner MooncakeStoreConnector to kv_producer on the prefiller. The surrounding text advertises "cross-instance prefix cache sharing via the distributed store" — but with kv_producer th

vllm.title: [Bugfix][MoE] FlashInfer one-sided: workspace union across heterogeneous layers
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FlashInferNVLinkOneSidedManager.initialize() was first-call-wins: it sized the shared MNNVL workspace from the first MoE layer and short-circuited the rest. Models with heterogeneous MoE blocks payloads (e.g. quantized base MoE + unquantized MTP head) overran the workspace on a later layer's

Purpose
It appears that flashinfer autotune file cache is inadequate to discriminate kernel parameters like use_8x4_sf_layout in its file cache keys, resulting in invalid tactics being chosen with colliding calls:

Purpose
Support the post-norm architecture EAGLE-3 models for speculative decoding.
Blog / Twitter Thread: https://x.com/dogacel0/status/2054203929378873661?s=20

Support post-norm & individual fc norm architectural changes.
Fix a bug in gpu_model_runner.py where captured aux layers were not properl

vllm.title: Fix error in Dynamic NTK scaling
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a fix for #41236
The scaling formula was wrong resulting in a constant scaling factor. The nomic embedding models are trained with a shorter length, usually indicated by max_position_embeddings or by max_trained_positions.  But can be scaled up to a longer size, indicated by n_positions.
Her

vllm.title: [CPU][DOC] Fix installation commands for Arm CPUs
vllm.author: fadara01
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Since torch 2.10, PyPI contains CUDA (not CPU only) wheels for AArch64 Linux.
As a result, for Arm CPUs we now need to use --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu or --torch-backend cpu for uv, similar to x86.
The current commands in the docs fails with this error:
ERROR: Coul

vllm.title: [bug] fix WeightTransferConfig.backend to allow for all strings
vllm.author: hao-aaron
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
WeightTransferConfig dataclass currently only allows 'ipc' and 'nccl', third-party weight transfer backends have to either patch this file or use object.__setattr__ to bypass pydantic. Change backend to str type, which is still validated against the WeightTransferEngineFactory  at runtime.
T

vllm.title: [MRV2][BugFix] Fix default-stream CG capture in P/W LoRA case
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #42999.
CUDA graphs must be captured on a non-default stream.

vllm.title: [Cohere] Enable Cohere MoE
vllm.author: Terrencezzj
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up to #42078
Turns on Cohere Command A+ model (official name) withing vLLM code. The official HF repo will be CohereLabs/command-a-plus-05-2026.
Cmd to run the model:
Install vLLM and dependencies
uv pip install -U vllm --torch-backend=auto
uv pip install cohere_melody>=0.9.0

Start server
vl

For Speculators DFlash models, we ensure the dflash_config matches these semantics while keeping the eagle config as expecte

vllm.title: add enqueue all option to throughput benchmark
vllm.author: pmaybank
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a solution to a race condition that causes unpredictable batch size.
When,
outputs = llm.chat(prompts, sampling_params, use_tqdm=True)
inside the run_vllm_chat function there are two concurrent processes (1) adding requests to queue, (2) processing requests in batches.
This PR

adds prequ

vllm.title: [Perf] Avoid forward scan for async output placeholders
vllm.author: izikgo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR avoids a forward scan through each request's full generated-token
history when patching async output-token placeholders.
InputBatch.update_async_output_token_ids() currently finds the first -1
placeholder with req_output_token_ids.index(-1), which is linear in the
generated sequence

vllm.title: [KV Offload] Pass `OffloadingSpec` instead of `VllmConfig` to secondary tiers
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Pass OffloadingSpec instead of VllmConfig to secondary tiers, giving them access to a more general interface that includes offloading-specific config (block sizes, num_blocks, etc.)
VllmConfig is still accessible via offloading_spec.vllm_config if needed
